514 reviews. 4.5 stars. For dumplings on a beach island.

Thường Lạc Artisan Dumplings in Phú Quốc is earning those numbers one fold at a time. Handcrafted dumplings, a Chinese kitchen doing the work, and a crowd that keeps coming back.

Not every good meal in Phu Quoc is on the beach. Some of them are on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 and worth every detour.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
